title: NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly
description: NEB NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix (#E2621): kit components plus the 20 uL isothermal assembly reaction for joining 2-6 overlapping fragments.

payload.body:
## Purpose

Join multiple overlapping DNA fragments (a vector plus 1-5 inserts) into a single seamless construct in one isothermal reaction, then transform into competent cells. Suited to fragments sharing 15-25 bp end overlaps.

## Kit components

New England Biolabs NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix, #E2621. The 2X master mix combines three activities in a single buffer:

| Component | Role |
| --- | --- |
| NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix (2X) | Single tube combining the three enzymes below |
| 5' exonuclease | Chews back 5' ends to expose single-stranded 3' overhangs that anneal complementary fragment ends |
| High-fidelity DNA polymerase | Fills in the gaps once fragments anneal |
| DNA ligase | Seals the remaining nicks into a covalently closed double strand |

The cloning kit format (#E5520) and large-fragment bundle (#E2623) add NEB 5-alpha or 10-beta competent cells. Supply your own purified, overlapping fragments (PCR products or linearized vector).

## Reaction setup (20 uL)

| Component | 2-3 fragments | 4-6 fragments |
| --- | --- | --- |
| NEBuilder HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix (2X) | 10 uL | 10 uL |
| Total amount of fragments | 0.03-0.2 pmol (X uL) | 0.2-0.5 pmol (X uL) |
| Deionized water | 10 - X uL | 10 - X uL |
| Total volume | 20 uL | 20 uL |

Recommended vector-to-insert molar ratio: 1:2 to 1:3 for 2-3 fragments, 1:1 for 4-6 fragments. (50 ng of a 5 kb fragment is approximately 0.015 pmol.)

## Steps

1. Assemble the reaction on ice in the volumes above. Keep total fragment input in the recommended pmol range; set up a positive control with 10 uL of the supplied control fragments + 10 uL master mix if desired.
2. Incubate in a thermocycler at 50 C: 15 min for 2-3 fragments, 60 min for 4-6 fragments.
3. Place the reaction on ice. Store at -20 C if not transforming immediately.
4. Transform 2 uL of the assembled reaction into 50 uL of competent E. coli (NEB 5-alpha for products < 10 kb; 10-beta for larger). Recover and plate on selective medium.

## Expected result

Colonies carrying the seamlessly assembled construct. Screen by colony PCR or restriction digest and confirm by sequencing across the junctions.

## Notes

- Overlaps of 15-25 bp between adjacent fragments are required; design them with the free NEBuilder Assembly Tool.
- For more than 6 fragments or fragments < 200 bp, increase the higher input end of the range and extend incubation toward 60 min.
- Source (official): https://www.neb.com/en-us/protocols/nebuilder-hifi-dna-assembly-reaction-protocol and product page https://www.neb.com/en-us/products/e2621-nebuilder-hifi-dna-assembly-master-mix
